name: stackra/transaction
purpose: Money-movement double-entry ledger — Transaction + TransactionLedgerEntry aggregates recording every debit/credit against tenant accounts.
capabilities: Transaction aggregate (trx_ prefix) — ledger root record
when_to_use: Every money movement — payments, refunds, payouts, chargebacks, fees — needs an accounting-grade double-entry ledger row.
when_not_to_use: For customer-facing invoicing, use stackra/invoice. For payment intents, use stackra/payment.
